results.name: has_cta
results.detail: button must be "Download Vibe Health →" + highlighted title

results.name: follows_json_schema
results.detail: key, theme not in health/looksmax, bg_prompts

rationales.hook_strength: 'Free daily gym' is concrete and relatable but not contrarian or surprising enough to stop a scroll — too polite to earn a double-take.
rationales.clarity: Each slide holds one clean idea and the progression is logical, though 'notice your breath' as a slide concept is slightly abstract to act on.
rationales.audience_fit: Busy 20–35s who skip the gym will recognize themselves here, but the tone skews slightly older/wellness-magazine rather than native TikTok.
rationales.novelty: 'Take the stairs' is one of the most recycled pieces of health advice on the internet — the framing adds modest polish but not a fresh angle.
rationales.brand_fit: Hedged language ('may support', 'suggests progress'), plain voice, no hype words, and a functional CTA that ties directly to the app's step-tracking feature.
rationales.predicted_performance: Save rate will be low because the advice isn't surprising or specific enough to bookmark — strong brand voice can't overcome a premise audiences feel they already know.
